name: Dubliner Dip with Rustic Vegetables
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Mixed fresh greens (such as spinach, parsley, watercress, or other preferred greens)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare mixed fresh vegetables such as radishes, green onions, celery sticks, turnip sticks, boiled and chilled small new potatoes, blanched carrots, cauliflower pieces, and broccoli pieces.
2. In a food processor or blender, combine the mayonnaise, mixed greens, chopped green onion, and minced garlic.
3. Puree until smooth and transfer to a mixing bowl.
4. Stir in the sour cream and blend well.
5. Season with hot pepper sauce.
6. Chill overnight.
7. Serve with the prepared vegetables.
Makes 2 1/2 cups.
